top_signals.title: RINA awards first AiP for energy-harvesting ship
top_signals.summary: DRIFT Energy, a deep tech startup based in Bath, UK, has been awarded an Approval in Principle (AiP) by RINA for its ground-breaking, energy harvesting vessel design. The certificate was presented to DRIFT’s CEO, Ben Medland, by Patrizio Di Francesco, North Europe Special Projects BD Manager and Principal Engineer at RINA, during Seatrade Cruise Global ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Airbnb adds hotels, car rentals. Chesky says app can become an 'Amazon for services'
top_signals.summary: Airbnb on Wednesday added new services and independent hotels to its platform in its latest expansion move in the travel industry.

top_signals.title: Newly Built LNG Vessel for Diamond Global Energy Named DIAMOND GAS JADE
top_signals.summary: Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha, Ltd. (“K” LINE) is pleased to announce that a naming ceremony was held for a 174,000 m3 membrane-type LNG vessel for Mitsubishi Corporation subsidiary Diamond Global Energy Pte. Ltd. at Samsung Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. on May 19. The vessel is owned by a joint venture company and scheduled to be used ...

top_signals.title: GitHub investigates internal repositories breach claimed by TeamPCP
top_signals.summary: GitHub is investigating a breach of its internal repositories after the TeamPCP hacker group claimed to have accessed approximately 4,000 repositories containing private code. [...]

top_signals.title: Kpler acquires CITAC to expand African intelligence coverage
top_signals.summary: Kpler today announced the acquisition of CITAC, the leading market intelligence firm for Africa’s downstream energy sector, strengthening its suite of trade intelligence tools and expanding its global Insight offering. The acquisition enhances the value delivered to Kpler clients by adding unrivalled, on-the-ground expertise across one of the most strategically important and underserved energy markets. ...
